allow: Bash(node -e "import YouTube from 'youtube-sr'; console.log\(typeof YouTube, typeof YouTube.default, typeof YouTube.search\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Song: {d['radio']['song']['title']} - {d['radio']['song']['artist']}\\"\); print\(f\\"YouTube ID: {d['radio']['song']['youtubeId']}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Cached: {len\(d\)} songs'\); [print\(f'  {k} -> {v}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['radio']['song']; print\(f\\"Song: {s['title']} - {s['artist']}\\"\); print\(f\\"YouTube ID: {s['youtubeId']}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total cached: {len\(d\)}'\); print\(\)")
